description_long: This is a futuristic, tactical shotgun with a sleek, angular design, predominantly finished in matte gray with black and blue accents. The body features a robust, reinforced frame with a prominent circular mechanism at the center, likely for loading or action cycling. The grip is ergonomic, with a secondary foregrip for improved handling and stability, and the trigger area is protected by a large, rounded guard. The barrel is integrated into the upper body, with subtle venting and detailing along its length, and the stock is compact, blending seamlessly into the rear of the weapon. Blue highlights and small panel lines add a high-tech aesthetic, while the overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials. The shotgun appears designed for urban tactical scenarios, balancing durability, maneuverability, and advanced functionality.
description: A sleek, futuristic tactical shotgun with a matte gray body, black and blue accents, and an ergonomic dual-grip design. Its compact stock, integrated barrel, and high-tech detailing suggest advanced urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel opening, symmetrical body, and the compact, reinforced muzzle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ergonomic grip, circular action mechanism, and blue-accented details along the matte gray body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact stock, central alignment of the barrel, and the symmetrical design of the shotgun's back end.
description_view_3: Right side view revealing the secondary grip, detailed panel lines, and the robust, angular construction of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, integrated with the upper body, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, rounded trigger guard with a reinforced, elongated shape and smooth edges
